SUBJECT: Your FastComments Webhook Has Been Disabled
DETAILS_LINE_ONE: This is an automated email. The following webhook integrations were automatically disabled after about a week of failed deliveries:
DETAILS_LINE_TWO: Queued events are kept and will be delivered once you fix the endpoint and re-enable the webhook. You can re-enable your webhooks here.
IN_APP_MESSAGE: One or more of your webhooks were disabled after repeated failures. Click to review and re-enable.
